benefits.description: Used BPC-157 for knee and thumb issues; results described as mediocre

protocol_notes: Switched to prolotherapy and prolozone after finding BPC-157 results mediocre. Prolozone (saline, sucrose, B vitamins, ozone injection under ultrasound guidance) reduced thumb pain from 8/10 to 2/10 over 7 injections. Right knee pain reduced from 6/10 to 2/10 with prolozone in February. Left knee (newly injured July 3) pain reduced from 8/10 to 4/10 with prolozone. Has had 20 knee surgeries and Lyme disease which weakens cartilage.
